PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
A dynamic and results-oriented Business Administration student with cross-functional experience in sales operations, recruitment analytics, and digital tools. Passionate about simplifying complex processes and leveraging data-driven insights to improve professional efficiency. Proactive in adopting emerging technologies and AI tools to optimize workflows and drive organizational value.

CORE COMPETENCIES
- Operational Excellence: Documentation, reporting, and daily business operations.
- Strategic Communication: Client engagement, product demonstrations, sales communication.
- Data Intelligence: Data visualization (Excel/PowerPoint), reporting, recruitment analytics.
- Tech Adaptability: AI tools for process optimization, ATS enhancement, workflow automation.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
1. Bajaj Finserv | Sales Trainee (Sep 2025 – Nov 2025)
   - Client Management: Managed customer inquiries and delivered product demonstrations.
   - Operational Support: Enhanced sales team efficiency through active lead generation.
   - Business Process: Deep understanding of dealership operations and dynamics.

2. Amanah Jobs | Human Resources Intern (Oct 2025 – Nov 2025)
   - AI Integration: Leveraged AI tools to streamline candidate sourcing.
   - Optimization: Created ATS-friendly resumes and optimized job postings.
   - Analytics: Foundational skills in talent acquisition and recruitment automation.
